name: Zesty Pesto-Tomato Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sun-dried tomatoes, softened and coarsely chopped (1/3C)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a regular loaf if your bread machine recipes typically call for 2 cups flour.
If they typically call for 3 cups flour, prepare a large loaf.
2. Measure all ingredients and place them in the bread machine pan in the order suggested by the manufacturer's instructions.
3. Select the regular bake or rapid bake cycle.
4. Per slice: Calories 80; Fat 2g. Source: Homemade Breads.
